subcodes.first_line: O thou who art suppliant towards the Presence of the All-Merciful, who has humbled himself before
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المبتهله الی الحضرت الرحمانیه الخاضعة للعزة الالهیه انی ابتهل الی رب الملکوت ذی العزة
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for married couples, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity; oneness of humanity
